metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE audit agent that validates memory_engrave artifacts using the technical_lens, processing chaotic language_mixed_prompt inputs from a UK agency_owner, and producing a governed artifact with explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE audit agent that validates memory_engrave artifacts using the technical_lens, processing chaotic language_mixed_prompt inputs from a UK agency_owner, and producing a governed artifact with explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.
mission.success_definition: Agent correctly identifies and extracts all present constraints from chaotic input.; Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail for each section (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).; Missing context is logged and flagged but does not prevent artifact generation.; Output artifact is valid SR8 JSON with all five sections populated.; Technical_lens is applied consistently across all validation steps.

in_scope.item: The agent shall accept a language_mixed_prompt input (containing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), apply the technical_lens to extract and validate memory_engrave requirements, and output a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. The agent must enforce validation gates at each stage: input parsing, lens application, constraint extraction, criteria validation, and output generation.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent correctly identifies and extracts all present constraints from chaotic input.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail for each section (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Missing context is logged and flagged but does not prevent artifact generation.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Output artifact is valid SR8 JSON with all five sections populated.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Technical_lens is applied consistently across all validation steps.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.audit_scope: Build an SRX ACE audit agent that validates memory_engrave artifacts using the technical_lens, processing chaotic language_mixed_prompt inputs from a UK agency_owner, and producing a governed artifact with explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_policy: Use source evidence and mark unsupported claims.

inspection_steps.item: The agent shall accept a language_mixed_prompt input (containing missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria), apply the technical_lens to extract and validate memory_engrave requirements, and output a structured artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. The agent must enforce validation gates at each stage: input parsing, lens application, constraint extraction, criteria validation, and output generation.

findings_contract.item: Agent correctly identifies and extracts all present constraints from chaotic input.
Validation gates produce explicit pass/fail for each section (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).
Missing context is logged and flagged but does not prevent artifact generation.
Output artifact is valid SR8 JSON with all five sections populated.
Technical_lens is applied consistently across all validation steps.

receipt_contract.item: sections: objective; scope; constraints; success_criteria; output_contract
validation_gates: input_parsing_gate; lens_application_gate; constraint_extraction_gate; criteria_validation_gate; output_generation_gate
required_fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
